comment.body: something i've been thinking about but guys like Qullamaggie and Dan Zanger have documented returns from 10k to 100M+. they traded charts, not news or geopolitical events. why? bc that is noise to them. they trusted that smarter/more connected institutions would correctly price assets faster and more accurately (efficient market theory) than they could and that it would show up in the charts. their job was to catch the meat of the move, not be the first one in.

comment.body:
Point 2: Alma shouldn’t have to apologize or practically beg for forgiveness if she confuses us or overwhelms us with high-level content or geopolitics. NO—we owe her so much, and we are the ones who need to step up, learn, mature this chat, and grow. Time is passing; Alma will eventually end this Substack one day, and if we don’t evolve, we’ll have wasted it all.
What I want in the future is to learn how to fish the right way. But if you’re here just to have your hand held like a baby, and you start crying “It’s not fair—I pay $35 and one trade fails!”, then I’ll say it again: SHUT YOUR MOUTH so we can move forward. BE HUMBLE and learn.
The knowledge Alma shares is light-years beyond my basic understanding, but Alma must keep pushing ahead—AND WE MUST ADAPT. There are people like me who truly value this. Every day after work, I dedicate myself to learning something new. But I refuse to let next year arrive, the Substack end, and still see us blaming Alma while squandering the time and wisdom she’s tried to give us.
THANK YOU.

comment.body: Im not trying to argue with you or say you did anything wrong.. so plz dont take it this way... but, sometimes wording and approach could be tweaked for better results...  like 2 things you said... 1. you are busy and dont have alot of time.. some ppl might think, "well, i've spent years learning this putting work into it but you want it simplified and  hand it to you when you can earn it like i did?" kind of like the kid who doesn't go to class but wants you to give him the answers to the test you studied for.  NOT saying this is you... just saying, sometimes ppl can approach things differently if their original attempt isn't working out, just like trading..   ALSO, when you said 2. i read the article already and didn't understand... by clarifying that and being specific as to what exactly you dont understand in the article ppl will usually be much more capable and able to help if they understand where you are and how to help.
